title: Is Larry Ellison’s Oracle turning out to be an oracle of the global tech industry?
description: How a 6 a.m. email became the symbol of tech’s great AI reckoning, explains global tech industry analysts to The Hindu. The message from the boardroom is unambiguous: AI infrastructure is the future, and legacy headcount is the budget. So, Mr. Ellison is not the only guy, but just that he’s the loudest name this week
